# upload-files-to-forge-api
Description: Uploads files to the Forge platform using its API after they have been written to the filesystem.
Source: project
1. Ensure the desired files are written to the local filesystem.
2. Access the Forge platform's file API.
3. Initiate the upload process for the files from the filesystem to the Forge platform using the API.
4. Verify that the files are successfully uploaded and visible within the Forge editor or interface.
